# Vendored web assets

- `asciinema-player.min.js`, `asciinema-player.css` — [asciinema-player](https://github.com/asciinema/asciinema-player)
  v3.17.0, Apache License 2.0, © the asciinema-player authors. Fetched from the npm
  `asciinema-player@3.17.0` package (`dist/bundle/`). Vendored so the session browser is
  fully self-contained (no CDN at view time); served at `/assets/asciinema-player.{js,css}`.
  Player ≥3.10 is required for asciicast v3 playback (scsh records v3).
